title: Vertical SaaS M&A Target Profile

slides.title: Vertical SaaS M&A Target Profile
slides.subtitle: Acquisition screening view for a healthcare software platform

slides.title: Target appears strategically attractive if revenue durability and enterprise expansion are validated
bullets: Mission-critical workflow positioning supports high gross retention and pricing power.
Healthcare end-market digitization creates a multi-year growth runway across provider and payer customers.
Strategic fit depends on integration feasibility, data interoperability, and channel overlap.
Key diligence focus should be cohort retention, net revenue expansion, churn concentration, and security posture.
slides.source: Source: Company materials placeholder; public market data; BankerDeck analysis.

slides.title: Illustrative financial profile shows premium growth with improving operating leverage
slides.source: Note: Illustrative figures. Source: BankerDeck analysis.

slides.title: Diligence should prioritize revenue quality, compliance, and integration risk
rows: Are cohorts expanding after year two?
Do top 10 customers exceed 30% of ARR?
How modern are APIs and data models?

slides.title: Illustrative valuation range remains most sensitive to growth durability and margin path
slides.source: Note: Illustrative multiple range only. Source: BankerDeck analysis.
